target: IGLOO-NORM: static catenary-curve pre-normalization of per-head FLOP distribution; architectural load-balance prior, no runtime router

results.title: Igloo — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Source-domain only (igloo/catenary architecture); no LLM/attention/head-load content.

results.title: Multi-Query Attention (MQA) (2019/11)
results.snippet: LLM-side: shared keys/values across heads reduce memory.
results.rationale: Attention head modification for efficiency, but reduces KV memory rather than pre-normalizing per-head FLOPs by a catenary profile; no static load-distribution prior.

results.title: Grouped-Query Attention (GQA) (2023/5)
results.snippet: LLM-side: grouped keys/values across head subsets.
results.rationale: Groups KV heads (architectural head modification for efficiency), but no catenary/load-distribution pre-normalization; mechanism is grouping, not FLOP-profile shaping.

results.title: LIBRA Load Balancing for MoE (2025)
results.snippet: LLM-side: predict expert load + balancing algorithm.
results.rationale: Load balancing in MoE, but dynamic expert prediction rather than static architectural pre-normalization of per-head FLOPs; different granularity (experts vs heads) and dynamic vs static.

results.title: Block: Load Balancing in LLM Serving (2025/8)
results.rationale: Serving-side load balancing (predictive scheduling), not architectural per-head FLOP pre-normalization; different layer entirely (system vs architecture).

results.title: Static Head-Load Pre-Normalization for Attention (2025/9)
results.snippet: LLM-side: pre-norm head load distribution architectural prior.
results.rationale: Direct match on static pre-normalization of per-head load as architectural prior; missing only the catenary-curve specification but mechanism core overlaps strongly. KW: 'static', 'head-load', 'pre-normalization'.

results.title: Catenary-Inspired Architectural Load Distribution in Transformers (2026/3)
results.snippet: LLM-side: catenary-curve pre-normalization for head-FLOP distribution.
results.rationale: Direct match: catenary-curve pre-normalization for per-head FLOP distribution—exact mechanism. KW: 'catenary', 'architectural load', 'pre-normalization', 'head-FLOP distribution'.

results.title: Tapered Head Capacity for Memory-Efficient Inference (2024/11)
results.snippet: LLM-side: tapered head-capacity profile across attention heads.
results.rationale: Tapered per-head capacity profile is functionally adjacent: static architectural per-head shaping (taper resembles catenary tail), though not catenary-specific. Sem at threshold; func above 0.7.

summary.novelty_assessment: Not novel: rank 7 (2603.04582) is a near-identical direct precedent (catenary-curve pre-normalization of per-head FLOPs); rank 6 (2509.20194) covers the static head-load pre-normalization core; rank 8 (2411.18927) covers tapered per-head capacity profile. The catenary-curve specialization is decoration over established static pre-normalization practice.
